x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: GRC policies and controls are the data foundation Now Assist GRC uses for AI-assisted compliance assessment and control testing recommendations.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Populate policies aligned to key frameworks (SOC2, ISO27001, NIST). Map controls to policies. Target: 10+ active policies, 50+ active controls.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_ca03a33acfd903108935fb251d851cc5
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[GRC policies and controls are the data foundation Now Assist GRC uses for AI-assisted compliance assessment and control testing recommendations.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Policy and Control Population</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function() {
    var policyTable = new GlideRecord("sn_compliance_policy");
    if (!policyTable.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table sn_compliance_policy not found", finding: "Compliance Policy table (sn_compliance_policy) is not available. Verify the Policy and Compliance plugin is active." };
    }
    var gaPolicy = new GlideAggregate("sn_compliance_policy");
    gaPolicy.addQuery("active", true);
    gaPolicy.addAggregate("COUNT");
    gaPolicy.query();
    var policies = gaPolicy.next() ? parseInt(gaPolicy.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    var controls = 0;
    var controlTable = new GlideRecord("sn_compliance_control");
    if (controlTable.isValid()) {
        var gaControl = new GlideAggregate("sn_compliance_control");
        gaControl.addQuery("active", true);
        gaControl.addAggregate("COUNT");
        gaControl.query();
        controls = gaControl.next() ? parseInt(gaControl.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    }
    var actualValue = policies + " active policies | " + controls + " active controls";
    if (policies >= 10 && controls >= 50) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Good GRC data foundation — Now Assist can perform AI-assisted compliance assessment across " + policies + " policies and " + controls + " controls." };
    } else if (policies >= 5 || controls >= 20) {
        return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Partial GRC data (" + policies + " policies, " + controls + " controls). Now Assist GRC AI assessment will have limited coverage. Target: 10+ policies, 50+ controls." };
    } else {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Insufficient GRC data (" + policies + " policies, " + controls + " controls). Now Assist GRC AI assessment requires a comprehensive policy and control foundation." };
    }
})()]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>GRC</module>
<number>CHK0006081</number>
<order>20</order>
<remediation_guidance>Populate policies aligned to key frameworks (SOC2, ISO27001, NIST). Map controls to policies. Target: 10+ active policies, 50+ active controls.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>ca03a33acfd903108935fb251d851cc5</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
